strategy: Generate the largest safe sequential batch per run without sacrificing B01-level depth; never skip catalog order.
workflow: Read catalog.json and choose the first planned lesson in recommended order.
Read already published related lessons to avoid contradiction and duplication.
Generate complete lesson JSON with B01-level depth.
Update search-index.json and glossary when needed.
Update this file: add completed lessons and set current to the next planned lesson.
Validate JSON, paths, section IDs, quiz answers and explanations.
Open a pull request and merge only when all quality gates pass.
